subcodes.first_line: O ye who long for the divine countenance! Every soul in this world is occupied with some pursuit and engaged in some endeavour. One is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مشتاق جمال الهی هر انسان در این جهان بکاری مشغول و بامری مالوف یکی در
subcodes.subjects: @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @service to others; to the Cause of God
